text.message: We gotta limit blue's wheat boys
That's not winning you the game
ehm what do i do here then?
You have to lock the wheat
Only way the rest of us have a chance.
And if he takes 3 10 then so be it
Ok, that works too I guess
massive amount of brick, barely wood
You still have the road stuff to beat him to 5 10
Our job is to delay that
You had to know this is the deal when you take the ore there
I'd do the same thing in first...I get it
i dont think i shoudve done that
Damn, those 3s are great for blue
I can't block you and blue
And you had just hit me
But red, you see how that 3 is so key to block now right?
He has a YOP or rb
Still gives you the 8..and I don't want to hit oj.
We need OJ to challenge on devs
Ugh, he's close to his port now
with this i can play his 10 5
But limiting blue's settles is key
But I won't hit you again right now red obvi
Still thinks Orange so much better
well it wsa obvi not me solo earlier too
You're both in good shape now
now oj has army and road
but I can help you dev
I said I'd trade it and you steal
Sorry red..you are getting the short end on this
One block was bad in hindsight yes
This latest is not on e
red is fine, with this wood port, definitely still has a chance
the lastest doesn't hit me a tenth of what the first did
i'm supposed to be faster early then ore wheat
what are these dices tho for blue
xd oj trading 1:1 black with 13 cards
Look, we all know you will take my road
I'm gonna be at 5 or 6 when you do red
i'm not gonna take it soon
Meanwhile we know blue will mono us at some point
Worse than my block on you early by far
did i put robber on somebody else for like 6 orbits ?
The amount of orbits is irrelevant
i hit blue every time i rolled 7
How can you even say that?
in fact that's his main source of ore
Have you not seen the rolls?
It's ok...it will be over soon
especialy when you misplay like this
At least OJ has some sense
because he talked his way out of it
I think blue hits us with a mono soon
Unless I just win mother f'ers!!!
